Defendants Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allan E. Anderson, Esq. of Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley, Tel. 212.312.2048, for defendant and moving party;
David Olick, Esq. of the Law Office of David Olick, Tel. 707.750.1005, for plaintiff;
James B. Wright, Esq. of Buchalter Nemer, Tel. 415.227.0900 for defendant Hanson Bridgett.

Judge Robertson disclosed that he knows 2 attorneys in Hanson Bridgett. This fact does not, however, affect his ability to be fair and impartial in this case. No objection was raised by either party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, Defendant's Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration is taken under submission. Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Joinder Of Defendant Hanson And Brdigett Llp'S Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allan E. Anderson, Esq. of Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley, Tel. 212.312.2048, for defendant and moving party;
David Olick, Esq. of the Law Office of David Olick, Tel. 707.750.1005, for plaintiff;
James B. Wright, Esq. of Buchalter Nemer, Tel. 415.227.0900 for defendant Hanson Bridgett.

Judge Robertson disclosed that he knows 2 attorneys in Hanson Bridgett. This fact does not, however, affect his ability to be fair and impartial in this case. No objection was raised by either party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, Joinder Of Defendant Hanson And Brdigett LLP'S Motion To Compel Contractual Arbitration is taken under submission. Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
